reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, los sanguches de crudo y queso son los mejores de toda la ruta 2, la comida en general es excelente pero nunca les anda el aire, ya hace rato que paso y siempre los aires apagados, el otro día los laburantes estaban sofocados, era terrible el calor, media pila y gasten un poco que bastante deben facturar como para darnos comodidad a todos, lo demás de primera

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, the ham and cheese sandwiches are the best on Route 2, the food in general is excellent, but the air conditioning never works. I've been passing by for a while now and it's always off. The other day the workers were sweltering; it was terribly hot. They should put in a little effort and spend a bit more money, since they must be making enough to provide comfort for everyone. Everything else is top-notch.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtMGRha2t3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena atención con opciones en ACA de comprar para llevar.
Punto menos para YPF por no ser full y no aceptar el pago con la aplicación.
Los baños de ACA estaban en excelente estado, todo muy limpio.
Falto un poco de protocolo COVID en el comedor

(Translated by Google)
Good service with takeout options at ACA. A point against YPF for not being a full-service station and not accepting app payments. The ACA restrooms were in excellent condition, everything very clean. There was a slight lack of COVID protocols in the dining area.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/14840228736131746142/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNta2ZQZWNBEAE
